
First change name of file to anonymous name. then this will go into h5 files and change wherever the original sample name was stored 


```{r}
library(rhdf5)
source("Anonymize_h5_files/replace_ids.R")

FILES<- c("../BRAF/Pt_H.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_J.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_I.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_A.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_F.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_K.dna+protein.h5",
          "../BRAF/Pt_G.dna+protein.h5"
          )

for(file_path in FILES){
  remove_file_ids(file_path)
}
```
